name: Pineapple Cheese Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread margarine evenly on the sliced bread.
2. Place a slice of cheese on each piece of bread.
3. Add a pineapple ring on top of the cheese.
4. Place the assembled sandwiches in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C).
5. Bake until the cheese has melted, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Serve warm.
